name: Endy Original Mattress
introText: The Endy Original is Canada's best-reviewed foam mattress, designed specifically for Canadian sleepers with a 100-night trial and free shipping across Canada for $875 CAD (Queen).
whatWorks: Medium firmness suits the widest range of sleep positions — the Endy's proprietary foam layer provides enough give for side sleepers and enough support for back sleepers, making it versatile across couples.
Excellent motion isolation for couples — foam construction absorbs movement effectively, so one partner turning won't disturb the other.
worthKnowing: Edge support is softer than spring or hybrid mattresses — sitting or sleeping near the edge has less resistance; couples who use the full mattress width may want to consider the Endy Hybrid instead.
Firmer first week — the Endy typically softens slightly after 30 nights of use. The 100-night trial accounts for this break-in period.

commonComplaints.title: Edge support less than spring competitors
commonComplaints.body: All-foam mattresses lack the perimeter spring support of hybrid or innerspring designs. The Endy compresses more at the edge than hybrid alternatives.

commonComplaints.title: Can sleep warm for hot sleepers
commonComplaints.body: Some hot sleepers report the foam retains more heat than hybrid or spring alternatives. Endy's copper-infused foam mitigates this but doesn't eliminate it.

commonComplaints.title: No luxury feel at this price
commonComplaints.body: The Endy is comfortable and supportive but lacks the plush hotel feel of premium options like the Saatva. You're buying value, not luxury.

verdict: The Endy Original is the best Canadian mattress for most people — it's comfortable, well-supported, Canadian-made, and backed by a 100-night risk-free trial. At $875 for a Queen, it competes with mattresses costing twice as much. If you sleep warm or want better edge support, look at the Endy Hybrid.

realBuyers.quote: Best sleep I've had in years. The medium firmness works perfectly for my back. Woke up without back pain for the first time in months.
Tried for 100 nights. Kept it. It's comfortable, Canadian, and the price is fair. Nothing negative to say.
My partner moves a lot at night. I barely notice with the Endy. The motion isolation is excellent.

metaDescription: Endy Original Mattress review: 3-layer foam, medium firmness, 100-night trial. $875 CAD (Queen). Best Canadian foam mattress for most sleepers.
